---
title: LaTeX formula compatibility extension test
author: Dongyu Zhao
version: 0.1
date: '2026-05-09'
license: '[CC-BY-SA 4.0](http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0/)'
...

## LaTeX formula compatibility

These examples define the opt-in LaTeX delimiter surface supported by
the `formula` extension when `--latex-formula-delimiters` is enabled, alongside
the dollar delimiter surface enabled by `--dollar-formula-delimiters`.

```````````````````````````````` example
Inline \\(x+y\\) end.
.
Document scope=1:1..1:21 children=1
└── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:21 children=3
    ├── Text scope=1:1..1:7 literal="Inline " children=0
    ├── Formula scope=1:8..1:16 mode=embedded literal="x+y" children=0
    └── Text scope=1:17..1:21 literal=" end." children=0
````````````````````````````````

Single-backslash LaTeX-looking delimiters are ordinary Markdown escapes, not
formula delimiters.

```````````````````````````````` example
Inline \(x+y\) end.
.
Document scope=1:1..1:19 children=1
└── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:19 children=1
    └── Text scope=1:1..1:19 literal="Inline (x+y) end." children=0
````````````````````````````````

```````````````````````````````` example
Display \\[x+y\\] end.
.
Document scope=1:1..1:22 children=1
└── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:22 children=3
    ├── Text scope=1:1..1:8 literal="Display " children=0
    ├── Formula scope=1:9..1:17 mode=standalone literal="x+y" children=0
    └── Text scope=1:18..1:22 literal=" end." children=0
````````````````````````````````

```````````````````````````````` example
Display \[x+y\] end.
.
Document scope=1:1..1:20 children=1
└── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:20 children=1
    └── Text scope=1:1..1:20 literal="Display [x+y] end." children=0
````````````````````````````````

```````````````````````````````` example
\\[x+y\\]
.
Document scope=1:1..1:9 children=1
└── FormulaBlock scope=1:1..1:9 mode=standalone literal="x+y" children=0
````````````````````````````````

```````````````````````````````` example
\\[
x+y
\\]
.
Document scope=1:1..3:3 children=1
└── FormulaBlock scope=1:1..3:3 mode=standalone literal="x+y" children=0
````````````````````````````````

Display formula blocks bind before Markdown block syntax inside the body.

```````````````````````````````` example
\\[
\\nabla \\times \\boldsymbol{E}
=
-\\frac{\\partial \\boldsymbol{B}}{\\partial t}
\\]
.
Document scope=1:1..5:3 children=1
└── FormulaBlock scope=1:1..5:3 mode=standalone literal="\\\\nabla \\\\times \\\\boldsymbol{E}\n=\n-\\\\frac{\\\\partial \\\\boldsymbol{B}}{\\\\partial t}" children=0
````````````````````````````````

```````````````````````````````` example
Text $$x+y$$ end.
.
Document scope=1:1..1:17 children=1
└── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:17 children=3
    ├── Text scope=1:1..1:5 literal="Text " children=0
    ├── Formula scope=1:6..1:12 mode=standalone literal="x+y" children=0
    └── Text scope=1:13..1:17 literal=" end." children=0
````````````````````````````````

Dollar display formula blocks bind before Markdown block syntax inside the body.

```````````````````````````````` example
$$
\\nabla \\times \\boldsymbol{E}
=
-\\frac{\\partial \\boldsymbol{B}}{\\partial t}
$$
.
Document scope=1:1..5:2 children=1
└── FormulaBlock scope=1:1..5:2 mode=standalone literal="\\\\nabla \\\\times \\\\boldsymbol{E}\n=\n-\\\\frac{\\\\partial \\\\boldsymbol{B}}{\\\\partial t}" children=0
````````````````````````````````

Escaped backslash closers are body text, not delimiters.

```````````````````````````````` example
Text \\(a \) b\\) end.
.
Document scope=1:1..1:22 children=1
└── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:22 children=3
    ├── Text scope=1:1..1:5 literal="Text " children=0
    ├── Formula scope=1:6..1:17 mode=embedded literal="a ) b" children=0
    └── Text scope=1:18..1:22 literal=" end." children=0
````````````````````````````````

When a body contains the matching backslash delimiter, render with dollar
delimiters so LaTeX does not close early.

```````````````````````````````` example
Text $a\\)b$ end.
.
Document scope=1:1..1:17 children=1
└── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:17 children=3
    ├── Text scope=1:1..1:5 literal="Text " children=0
    ├── Formula scope=1:6..1:12 mode=embedded literal="a\\\\)b" children=0
    └── Text scope=1:13..1:17 literal=" end." children=0
````````````````````````````````

```````````````````````````````` example
Text $$a\\]b$$ end.
.
Document scope=1:1..1:19 children=1
└── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:19 children=3
    ├── Text scope=1:1..1:5 literal="Text " children=0
    ├── Formula scope=1:6..1:14 mode=standalone literal="a\\\\]b" children=0
    └── Text scope=1:15..1:19 literal=" end." children=0
````````````````````````````````
